input_schema.description: A cat picture to evaluate for frame dominance.
A cat picture to evaluate for proportional presence — how much of the frame the cat physically occupies.
A cat picture to evaluate for positional authority — whether the cat’s placement within the frame feels prominent and commanding.
A cat picture to evaluate for environmental clarity — whether the surrounding space defers to the cat or competes with it.

description: Scores how much a cat dominates the visual frame of a photograph (0 to 1) by evaluating three qualities: proportional presence, positional authority, and environmental clarity. Answers the question: is this picture truly about the cat, or is the cat just incidental?
